info.name: finish-build-trigger-plus
info.description: Enhanced Finish Build Trigger that adds: (1) Conditional multi-build trigger (AND) — watch multiple builds and trigger only when ALL complete, (2) "Trigger build on all enabled and compatible agents" (same as Schedule Trigger), (3) "Time to wait (in minutes)" delay before the triggered build is queued, (4) Build Customization (clean sources, custom parameters), (5) Triggering build information (injects watched build metadata and passes through the triggering user).
